column1: # FROZEN at the end of chunk 2. Transcribed from the §A1 golden table (rows 1-25)
# BEFORE any flexmark code existed (anti-circularity: expected ids come from the SPEC,
# never generated from renderer output). The chunk-2 contract-smoke spike validates these
# predictions against flexmark inside the free-correction window; see the spike report.
#   group         allocator namespace — rows sharing a group are processed in document
#                 order through ONE HeadingIdAllocator (per-page dedup, step 7).
#   heading_md    the heading's Markdown source (the spike parses this with flexmark and
#                 extracts the heading text content per §A1's input rule).
#   text          the §A1 "text content" the HeadingSlugger receives (text nodes verbatim,
#                 code-span contents, link/emphasis text, image alt text, breaks -> space).
#                 This is what the DOMAIN golden test feeds directly (zero flexmark imports).
